text:
Top 15 Best Candidate Screening Tools in 2026

This comprehensive guide evaluates leading candidate screening platforms designed to streamline recruitment processes. The article presents 15 tools with detailed information about each platform's founders, headquarters, founding year, customer base, pricing, capabilities, and G2 ratings.

WeCP (We Create Problems) leads the list as a tech organization specializing in hiring and talent evaluation. Founded in 2016 by Abhishek Kaushik and Mohit Goyal, it offers 'skill evaluations, technical interviews, and code exams' with a 4.8/5 G2 rating and pricing starting at $100/month.

Other prominent platforms include: HireVue: Uses AI for video interviews and automated assessments; HackerEarth: Global tech talent platform with 17,000+ coding challenges; TestGorilla: Features 284 scientifically validated tests; Harver: AI-powered pre-employment evaluation software; Codility: Offers 760+ coding tasks across multiple languages; HackerRank: Provides 2,700+ coding challenges covering 95+ skills.

Core Capabilities: These tools typically include automated resume screening, skills evaluation, background checks, technical assessments, and AI-powered analytics.

Pricing Range: Solutions vary significantly, from free trials to enterprise plans exceeding $35,000 monthly.
